---
title: "Trust Content Dashboard"
description: "A reporting project that translates inspection, repair, and vehicle walkaround content into buyer confidence."
date: 2026-01-30
categories: [Social Media, Trust, Automotive Content]
image: ../assets/argtech-operations-bay.png
---

## Business Question

Which Arg Tech content themes are most effective at building trust and motivating buyers to request more information?

## Dashboard Metrics

The dashboard compares content pillars using reach, saves, comments, profile visits, link clicks, engagement rate, and click-through rate.

| Content Pillar | Engagement Rate | Link CTR | Recommendation |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| Educational Tips | 6.2% | 1.8% | Scale |
| Student Stories | 5.7% | 1.1% | Continue |
| Event Promotions | 3.1% | 2.4% | Improve creative |
| Trend Posts | 7.4% | 0.6% | Use selectively |

## Insight

Trend posts generated the highest engagement rate but did not move visitors to owned channels. Educational tips produced a better balance of engagement and link behavior, making them a stronger candidate for repeatable content planning.

## Recommendation

Use educational tips as the core weekly content pillar, keep student stories for brand trust, and redesign event promotion posts with clearer calls to action.

## Employer-Relevant Skills

- Social KPI interpretation
- Dashboard storytelling
- Content performance analysis
- Channel recommendations
